_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the scope-conflict variant (branch 1) of the excel-activities/write-cell-failures playbook. Agent must chain: folders → jobs list faulted → jobs get (IOException identical to read-range-file-locked) → jobs logs (Modern scope opened successfully; Classic Workbook Write Cell faulted) → workflow source (dual-scope pattern is the smoking gun). The user's explicit exclusion of external lockers + the workflow source dual-scope pattern distinguish this from the external-locker variant of read-range-file-locked.
